tips_en: Start with RynnWorld-4D (Paper 3)—it offers the most complete system, bridging scalable 2D video priors with explicit 3D geometry for robotic manipulation, and pairs world modeling with a downstream policy showing strong real-world results. Then read AlayaWorld (Paper 1) for a complementary perspective on world models, as both tackle the same core challenge (temporally consistent, controllable video generation) but target different domains (robotics vs. interactive gaming), making them useful for cross-comparing design choices like camera control and long-horizon stability. SenseNova-Vision (Paper 2) is more foundational and can be read independently if you are interested in unifying vision tasks rather than world modeling.
tips_zh: 建议先读第三篇 RynnWorld-4D——它系统最完整，将可扩展的 2D 视频先验与显式 3D 几何结合用于机器人操作，并配套下游策略，在真实任务上取得了强结果。随后阅读第一篇 AlayaWorld，两篇都以“时序一致且可控的视频生成”为核心，但面向不同领域（机器人 vs. 交互式游戏），对比可学习相机控制、长时稳定性等设计取舍。第二篇 SenseNova-Vision 更偏基础路线，若你关注的是视觉任务统一而非世界建模，可单独阅读。
